_comment: Fast-cadence reply decision-maker (src/triggers/reply_manager.py), split out from ai_manager.py so replies run far more often than the slow 4-6/day post cadence. Only ever considers reply_only accounts in config/reply_targets.json -- bigger accounts commonly restrict who can reply to their posts, so this trigger never wastes a call on candidates that would just 403 regardless of content (see ai_manager.py for those accounts' repost-only treatment).
